company: Indian Roller Industries Pvt. Ltd.
industry: Industrial Rollers Manufacturing

description:
Manufacturer of rubber, polyurethane, silicone and industrial rollers
for steel, textile, paper, packaging, food and plywood industries.

- Rubber Rollers
- Polyurethane Rollers
- Silicone Rollers
- Industrial Rollers

- Polyurethane
- Silicone
- EPDM
- NBR
- Ebonite
